prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约13681→16014→15459→14701，整体在1.4–1.6万间波动；2025年山西省首次实施新高考（物理类/历史类），物理类最低位次为31400，较传统理科位次大幅后移，属考试模式切换导致的位次体系重构，不可直接与往年比较；该校在山西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年163人、2022年166人、2023年170人、2024年181人、2025年196人，呈逐年扩招趋势；2026年计划212人，较2025年增加16人（扩招约8.2%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第55名，近年排名稳定在49–55区间，属中上水平211；2023年高考周期内声誉评价为中性/混合（图书馆表白墙事件，属校园管理类舆情，影响有限）；2026年声誉数据中无该校负面记录；抖音综合热度排名第102，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量较低；投档异常文件中未见该校断档记录，整体报考心理平稳；第五轮学科评估：作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A、兽医学A-、畜牧学A-，共5个A-及以上学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程为高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学为推荐；农林类相关专业热度一般，分化观望。本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解；省控线数据2026年缺失，；南京农业大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角发达地区，对山西考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在山西省招生人数占全国总招生比例约2.5%–3%（2024年约2.5%），属中等偏下水平，非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年物理类考生小幅减少、招生计划继续扩招约8.2%以及学校声誉平稳等因素：扩招对位次有下拉作用（位次数字增大），但考生对新高考模式更熟悉后报考趋于理性、考生总数略降以及学校211层次+长三角地域的稳定吸引力，共同推动位次小幅回升（数字减小）。经权衡，预测2026年物理类最低位次约32438名，区间31938–32938名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the lowest science ranking was approximately 13681 → 16014 → 15459 → 14701, fluctuating between 14,000 and 16,000 overall. In 2025, Shanxi Province implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time (Physics Category/History Category), with the lowest ranking for Physics Category being 31400, significantly shifted backward compared to traditional science rankings, due to the restructuring of the ranking system caused by the exam mode switch, and cannot be directly compared with previous years. The university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for science/Physics Category: 163 in 2021, 166 in 2022, 170 in 2023, 181 in 2024, 196 in 2025, showing a trend of gradual expansion. The 2026 plan is 212, an increase of 16 from 2025 (expansion of about 8.2%), a relatively large expansion, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 55th on the main list, with stable rankings in the 49–55 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident, a campus management type public opinion, with limited impact). In the 2026 reputation data, there are no negative records for this university. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 102, evaluated as 'average', with low short video exposure. No record of a cutoff anomaly was found in the file, indicating overall stable application psychology. Fifth round discipline evaluation: Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are high-heat recommendations; Clinical Medicine, Stomatology are recommended; Agriculture and forestry related majors have average popularity, with differentiation and wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 from 173,347 in 2025 (-3.4%), slightly easing competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing City, Jiangsu Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has a certain regional attraction for Shanxi candidates. The university's enrollment in Shanxi Province accounts for about 2.5%–3% of its total national enrollment (about 2.5% in 2024), which is below average, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant backward shift in rankings in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in 2026, the continued expansion of enrollment plans by about 8.2%, and the stable reputation of the university: expansion has a downward pull on rankings (ranking number increases), but candidates becoming more familiar with the new exam mode leading to more rational applications, a slight decrease in total candidates, and the stable attraction of the university's 211 level and Yangtze River Delta region, together drive a slight recovery in rankings (ranking number decreases). After weighing, it is predicted that the lowest ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 32438, with a range of 31938–32938.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 32438, range 31938–32938. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering, Veterinary Medicine, Accounting, Statistics, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Data Science, etc.) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Agronomy, Plant Protection, Horticulture, etc., which are flagship but low popularity) as safe backups. Candidates significantly above the lower bound of the range (<31938) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年历史类位次后移的基数效应、2026年历史类考生大幅减少约25.6%、招生计划持平以及学校声誉平稳等因素：考生总数大幅下降是影响2026年位次的最关键因素，竞争显著缓解将推动位次数字明显增大（更容易进）；同时学校211层次和长三角地域对文科考生仍有稳定吸引力。经权衡，预测2026年历史类最低位次约3663名，区间3163–4163名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1988 → 2727 → 2814 → 2582, fluctuating overall between 2000 and 2800, with a slight backward shift in recent years; in 2025, Shanxi Province implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time, with the minimum ranking for the History Category being 3513, a backward shift of about 700–1500 places compared to traditional liberal arts rankings, which is a normal adjustment due to the change in exam format; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for liberal arts/History Category: 28 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 29 in 2024, 33 in 2025, with a slight increase in recent years; the 2026 plan is 33, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 55th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; the 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative records in 2026; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 102); no abnormal filing records, stable application psychology; the subject evaluations corresponding to the liberal arts majors offered by the university: Public Administration (Land Resource Management, etc.) corresponds to Public Administration without a separate rating; Sociology corresponds to Sociology without a separate rating; Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management corresponds to Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management without a separate rating; Finance and Investment correspond to Applied Economics without a separate rating. Liberal arts majors are not the university's area of disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity: Law recommended, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Finance/Economics/Economy divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages generally wait-and-see. The number of History Category examinees in the province in 2026 is 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) compared to 84,879 in 2025, greatly easing competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Nanjing is located in the Yangtze River Delta, which has a certain regional appeal for liberal arts examinees from Shanxi; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.5%–3%, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the base effect of the backward shift in History Category rankings in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the significant reduction of about 25.6% in History Category examinees in 2026, the unchanged enrollment plan, and the stable university reputation: the sharp decline in the total number of examinees is the most critical factor affecting the 2026 ranking, with significantly eased competition pushing the ranking number to increase noticeably (easier to enter); at the same time, the university's 211 level and Yangtze River Delta region still have stable appeal for liberal arts examinees. After weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 is approximately 3663, with a range of 3163–4163.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3163), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors.
